title: How to get a police certificate - Somalia - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate - Somalia
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.
You do not have to provide a police certificate from Somalia unless we ask for one.
Do I need to provide a police certificate with my application for permanent residence? If we ask for one.
If you have been asked to provide a police certificate for this country, follow the instructions below.

## How to get a police certificate:
Name of document(s) to get: Police Certificate

### If you are a citizen of Somalia:

#### If you live in Somalia:
Applicants located in Somaliland or Puntland should apply to the local police authority.

#### If you live outside of Somalia:
Applicants located in Somaliland or Puntland should apply to the local police authority.

### If you are not a citizen of Somalia:

#### If you live in Somalia:
Applicants located in Somaliland or Puntland should apply to the local police authority.

#### If you live outside of Somalia:
The information is not available at this time.

### Information and documents you need:
Fees (if applicable)
